title: DataGrid displaying created_at instead of created_formated
symptom: The 'created_formated' field is not displayed, and instead, the 'created_at' value appears.
applies_when: Using DataGrid to display data from Xano
Page is refreshed or data is reloaded
not_this_if: Data is displayed correctly without refresh
Issue occurs in a different component
root_cause: The 'created_formated' field is not being set correctly in the DataGrid settings, leading to the fallback display of 'created_at' instead. This typically happens when the configuration is not properly aligned with the data source.
fix_steps: Navigate to the column settings for 'created_formated'
Ensure the correct value is set for 'created_formated'
Save the changes and refresh the page
agent_instruction: Ensure the 'created_formated' value is correctly configured in the DataGrid column settings.
